stratagem.name: ARMOUR OF CONTEMPT
stratagem.lore: The belligerence of the Adeptus Astartes combined with their post‑human physiology makes them unyielding foes to face.
stratagem.when: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagem.target: One Adeptus Astartes unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagem.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagem.name: FURY OF THE FIRST
stratagem.lore: Losses only serve to stoke the fiery wrath of the Imperial Fists and increase their resolve.
stratagem.when: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagem.target: One Adeptus Astartes Terminator , Bladeguard Veteran Squad , Sternguard Veteran Squad or Vanguard Veteran Squad unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagem.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll. If your unit is below its Starting Strength, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

stratagem.name: OBDURATE VENGEANCE
stratagem.lore: Even when established wisdom favours retreat, the Imperial Fists remain defiant. Stubborn to the last, they would give their lives in the name of honour and the destruction of their foes.
stratagem.when: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagem.target: One Adeptus Astartes Terminator , Bladeguard Veteran Squad , Sternguard Veteran Squad or Vanguard Veteran Squad unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagem.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 3+, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

stratagem.name: WRATHFUL CONQUERORS
stratagem.lore: The battle‑brothers of the Imperial Fists 1st Company advance with merciless efficiency, eliminating all resistance and staking the Emperor’s claim.
stratagem.target: One Adeptus Astartes Terminator , Bladeguard Veteran Squad , Sternguard Veteran Squad or Vanguard Veteran Squad unit from your army within range of an objective marker you control.
stratagem.effect: That objective marker remains under your control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any phase.

stratagem.name: DISCIPLINED EXTERMINATION
stratagem.lore: Masters of bolter drill, the Imperial Fists utilise precise fire patterns to scour their enemies from hiding places and fell them in droves.
stratagem.target: One Adeptus Astartes Terminator , Bladeguard Veteran Squad , Sternguard Veteran Squad or Vanguard Veteran Squad unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagem.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability and improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of such weapons by 1.

stratagem.name: DROPSHIP EXTRACTION
stratagem.lore: Making use of a lull in fighting, Terminator squads pull back from the front line, boarding airborne transports and withdrawing to prepare their next assault.
stratagem.when: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
stratagem.target: One Adeptus Astartes Terminator unit from your army. You cannot target a unit that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagem.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.
